parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search across name, code, and type fields

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Column to sort by. Prefix with - for descending (e.g. -code)

parameters.name: filter[type]
parameters.description: Filter by type. Allowed values: Revenue, Expense, Asset, Liability, Equity, Bank, Current, Inventory, Fixed, Directcosts, Currliab, Termliab, Sales

parameters.name: included[]
parameters.description: IDs to always include in results
